---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or use case that this feature would solve. How would this feature benefit you or other users?

## Proposed Solution

If you have an idea for how this feature should work, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
